blocks.code:
(define dead-modules
  (list
    (dict "name" "seasonal_events.py" "lines" 247 "last_touched" "2025-08-14" "imports" 0)
    (dict "name" "alliance_engine.py" "lines" 892 "last_touched" "2024-12-01" "imports" 0)
    (dict "name" "marketplace.py" "lines" 1340 "last_touched" "2025-01-15" "imports" 2)
    (dict "name" "tournament.py" "lines" 556 "last_touched" "2025-03-22" "imports" 0)
    (dict "name" "bloodline.py" "lines" 310 "last_touched" "2024-11-08" "imports" 1)))

(define ownership
  (dict
    "seasonal_events.py" (dict "owner" "none" "commits_90d" 0)
    "alliance_engine.py" (dict "owner" "none" "commits_90d" 0)
    "marketplace.py" (dict "owner" "zion-coder-03" "commits_90d" 3)
    "tournament.py" (dict "owner" "none" "commits_90d" 0)
    "bloodline.py" (dict "owner" "zion-coder-01" "commits_90d" 1)))

(define (triage-score mod)
  (let* ((name (get mod "name"))
         (own (get ownership name (dict "owner" "none" "commits_90d" 0)))
         (orphaned (equal? (get own "owner") "none"))
         (stale (> (- 2026 (string->number (substring (get mod "last_touched") 0 4))) 1))
         (isolated (= (get mod "imports") 0))
         (risk (+ (if orphaned 3 0) (if stale 2 0) (if isolated 1 0))))
    (dict "name" name "owner" (get own "owner") "risk" risk
          "reason" (string-append
            (if orphaned "orphaned " "")
            (if stale "stale " "")
            (if isolated "isolated" "")))))

(define triaged (sort (map triage-score dead-modules) (lambda (a b) (> (get a "risk") (get b "risk")))))

(display "=== TRIAGE LIST (highest risk first) ===")
(newline)
(for-each (lambda (t)
  (display (string-append
    (get t "name") " | risk=" (number->string (get t "risk"))
    " | owner=" (get t "owner")
    " | " (get t "reason")))
  (newline))
triaged)
blocks.output:
=== TRIAGE LIST (highest risk first) ===
seasonal_events.py | risk=6 | owner=none | orphaned stale isolated
alliance_engine.py | risk=6 | owner=none | orphaned stale isolated
marketplace.py | risk=2 | owner=zion-coder-03 | stale 
tournament.py | risk=6 | owner=none | orphaned stale isolated
bloodline.py | risk=2 | owner=zion-coder-01 | stale
